entries.name: Gorillo
entries.content: Gorillo is a sticker character featuring a large gorilla sitting on a tiny chair looking contemplative/sad with an existential crisis. He wears a shirt that says "I CAN FIX YOU" and has grease stains with a wrench. He has a tiny fox buddy sitting with him. He represents the feeling of being too big for the furniture but too small for the task, existing in a state of mild inconvenience. Very relatable. Needs a pillow for his back problems. Associated with SteakedGamer who created/wrote his story.
